page_metadata.biotools__summary: Performs enrichment analyses for (primarily human) metabolomic studies. It identifies patterns of metabolite concentration changes in a biologically meaningful context. It uses a library of ~6300 predefined metabolite sets from pathways, disease signatures, genetic traits, and cellular/tissue locations. It also facilitates conversion between metabolite common names, synonyms and other database identifies.
